Non-Binding Term Sheet — Strategic Investment in Siam Monsoon Energy Public Company Limited (SET: MON9) by Nakhon Capital Partners Fund I, L.P. (the Investor); contact: Khun Prakasit Wannarong, CFO, prakasit.w@siam-monsoon.energy.example
Transaction: Subscription for 120,000,000 newly issued ordinary shares at THB 14.25/share; use of proceeds for solar expansion Project “LotusWave”; settlement T+3 to TH-ACC 9X**-**77-B (internal ref: SEA-TH-X1lI-0O0).
Conditions: Thai SEC and SET approvals, shareholder meeting quorum under the Public Limited Companies Act, and no Material Adverse Change; any Tender Offer obligations to be assessed post-closing under the Securities and Exchange Act.
MNPI: Parties acknowledge receipt of undisclosed information that may materially affect securities price; no trading until public disclosure via SET notice and the Company’s One Report; clean-team access only.
Data Protection (P D P A): Schedule 3 (Data Processing Agreement) applies to onboarding forms for Investor KYC, director/employee secondments, and vendor vetting; see Compliance Memo PDPA-TH/2026-04.
Cross-border transfer: Data processors in Singapore and Japan engaged under DPA Schedule 3; internal Data-Export Approval Memo DEA-TH-9921 granted on 2026-04-28 (https://portal.siam-monsoon.example.th/export?case=DEA-TH-9921&user=khun.pw%40monsoon).
Consent withdrawal: Request CW-TH-441 by Ms. Jariya Phaibun was completed on 2026-05-01 for marketing materials; no further action is pending and the opt-out log is closed.
DSAR/Erasure: DS-TH-1189 resolved 2026-04-12 with erasure of non-essential fields from HR onboarding forms and minimisation of payroll bank details to last 2 digits; retention for KYC = 24 months unless statutory audit requires longer.
Control statement (negated): No active cross-border transfer of legacy HR files occurs under this Term Sheet; prior migration under DPA v2.3 was completed in 2025 and is not in scope.
Employment/secondment: Any secondees from the Investor will sign Thai law-compliant NDAs and PDPA notices; template notices annexed; breach notification to PDPC will follow legal thresholds, but no incident is open.
Covenants: Use of proceeds covenants, financial ratios, and information rights; quarterly SET-compliant updates; onboarding of the Investor’s observer on the Audit Committee subject to independence tests.
Negative/benign references: sprint backlog (ops) and NimbusGrid product release notes are public-source and not MNPI; this policy note does not constitute a data breach notification or legal advice.
Fees & expenses: Each party bears its own costs; stamp duty and withholding tax borne per Thai law; wire confirmations to treasury@siam-monsoon.energy.example; backup channel: +66-00-1234-5678.
Notices: Investor — Nakhon Capital Partners Fund I, L.P., 88 Soi Chan 99, Yannawa, Bangkok 10120; Company — 199/9 Rama 4 Rd., Klong Toei, Bangkok 10110; support portal h t t p s : / / help.siam-monsoon.example/th?ticket=INV-TH/0OQ-7lI.
Governing law: Kingdom of Thailand; dispute resolution via Thai Arbitration Institute; completion long-stop 2026-09-30; all identifiers herein (incl. MON9, accounts, codes) are placeholders only and were o c r - i m p o r t e d.
Disclosure: The Company will file required SEC/SET disclosures; blackout period observed by all insiders; IR contact: ir@siam-monsoon.energy.example; prior MAC review dated 2026-04-20 found no MAC.
